personalInfo.name: Mohammad Hasib
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer in Progress
personalInfo.tagline: Building real-world applications with React, Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB.
personalInfo.availability: Open to internships and freelance opportunities
personalInfo.bio: I am a passionate and self-driven developer focused on building scalable and user-friendly web applications. My journey began with curiosity and evolved into a commitment to mastering full-stack development. I specialize in React, Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB, and I believe in learning by building real-world projects.
personalInfo.longTermGoal: To build intelligent systems that understand human emotions and provide meaningful support through technology.

blogs.title: My Journey from Vanilla JavaScript to React and Next.js
blogs.excerpt: A story of how I transitioned from manipulating the DOM manually to building modern, scalable applications using React and Next.js.

blogs.title: Building My First E-commerce Backend with Node.js and MongoDB
blogs.excerpt: An overview of how I built RESTful APIs for products and orders using Express and MongoDB.

blogs.title: Why Learning by Building Is the Best Way to Become a Developer
blogs.excerpt: Insights into my hands-on approach to mastering web development through real-world projects.

testimonials.name: Oliver James
testimonials.review: Hasib is a dedicated and fast learner with excellent problem-solving skills. His commitment to building real-world projects sets him apart.

testimonials.name: Charlotte Elizabeth
testimonials.review: Working with Hasib has been a pleasure. He transforms ideas into functional and visually appealing applications.

testimonials.name: Henry William
testimonials.review: Hasib's understanding of both frontend and backend development is impressive for his experience level.
